forgotPassword.title: I Forgot My Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address to reset your password. We will send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: The password reset link has been sent to your email address. Please check your email.
forgotPassword.emailNotFound: This e-mail address is not registered in the system.

resetPassword.title: Password Reset
resetPassword.invalidToken: Invalid or missing token. Please check the password reset link again.
resetPassword.successRedirect: Your password has been successfully reset. You are directed to the login page...
resetPassword.error: An error occurred during the password reset process

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.newPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.newPasswordMaxLength: The new password can be a maximum of 100 characters
validation.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: The new password cannot be the same as the existing password
